nasb.text: then the Lord will bring extraordinary plagues on you and your descendants, even severe and lasting plagues, and miserable and chronic sicknesses.

esv.text: then the Lord will bring on you and your offspring extraordinary afflictions, afflictions severe and lasting, and sicknesses grievous and lasting.

cnv.text: 耶和華就必使你和你的後裔遭受奇災，就是大而長久的災，毒而長久的病。

ccb.text: 祂必使你们及子孙遭遇严重而长久的灾难和疾病，
